Core Services

Six Strategic Pillars.
One Integrated Partner.

From strategy and creative to performance marketing, PR and DOOH media, we manage every touchpoint of the consumer journey.

01

Strategy & Planning

Market insights, audience targeting & campaign architecture tailored to your brand objectives and the Kenyan market landscape.

Market ResearchAudience TargetingCampaign ArchitectureKPI Setting
Learn More →
02

Branding & Creative

Complete brand identity solutions ensuring a strong, consistent image through custom designs, scripting, photography, and high-quality printing.

Brand IdentityGraphic DesignPhotographyVideo Production
Learn More →
03

Digital Marketing

Certified digital marketing solutions across SEO, social media, PPC, programmatic advertising, email marketing and CRM management.

SEO & SEMSocial MediaGoogle AdsProgrammatic
Learn More →
04

Content Development

Compelling video productions, static creatives, motion graphics, and DOOH-ready assets that stop the scroll and drive action.

Video ProductionMotion GraphicsCopywritingDOOH Assets
Learn More →
05

PR & Communications

Reputation management, media relations, brand amplification, and crisis communications across traditional and digital channels.

Media RelationsCrisis CommsPress ReleasesBrand Amplification
Learn More →
06

Experiential Marketing

Below-the-line activations, roadshows, trade promotions, brand activations and consumer promotion campaigns for maximum impact.

Brand ActivationsRoad ShowsTrade PromotionsEvents
Learn More →
Why Choose Us

Seven Reasons Leading Brands Trust Us

Positioned at the intersection of creativity, technology and media, Proventus delivers measurable brand impact across Kenya's fastest-growing markets. We don't just run campaigns — we build brand legacies.

Start Working Together →
"We don't just run campaigns.
We build brand legacies."
— Proventus Digital Limited
1

One Partner. Every Channel.

Strategy, creative, digital, PR, and media — fully integrated, always aligned.

2

We Own Our Media

Direct DOOH ownership means zero intermediaries, better pricing, and faster turnarounds.

3

Kenya-First Intelligence

Deep local market knowledge, consumer behaviour insights and cultural fluency.

4

Measurable Results, Always

Every campaign has defined KPIs. Every report shows real numbers, not vanity metrics.

5

Agile & Responsive

We move at the speed of business — fast briefings, quick pivots and proactive optimisation.

6

Senior Attention on Every Account

No juniors managing major campaigns. Senior strategists drive every client relationship.

7

Competitive Pricing

Premium quality at market-competitive rates with transparent billing and no hidden fees.

Our Approach

A 360° Marketing Process

At Proventus, we take a holistic approach to marketing and branding, working with industry professionals to offer comprehensive solutions. Every engagement is a partnership built on transparency, collaboration, and a shared commitment to results.

🔍
01

Discovery

Immersive briefing session to understand brand, audience, objectives, budget, and market context.

📋
02

Strategy

We develop a tailored campaign strategy, media plan, and measurable KPIs aligned to your goals.

💡
03

Creative

Our creative team develops compelling concepts, assets, and adaptations for every chosen channel.

⚡
04

Execution

Seamless campaign deployment across digital platforms, DOOH screens, PR, and content channels.

📊
05

Monitoring

Real-time tracking of campaign performance with proactive optimisations throughout the flight.

📄
06

Reporting

Comprehensive post-campaign report with results, insights, learnings and recommendations.

"Every engagement is a partnership built on transparency, collaboration, and a shared commitment to results."

DOOH Network

Premium Screens. Prime Locations.
Maximum Impact.

As both a creative agency and a DOOH media owner, we give clients unmatched end-to-end execution capability across Nairobi.

🏬

Premium Malls

High-dwell-time screens inside Kenya's premier retail destinations including Basic Killeleshwa and Basic Nyali.

✨

Lifestyle Centres

Strategically placed at the entrance of Rosslyn Luxury Mall where expatriates and diplomats shop.

🛣️

High-Traffic Roads

Large-format roadside and building-mounted digital screens along Nairobi's busiest arterial roads including Onestop Arcade in Karen.

Why DOOH Outperforms Traditional Out-of-Home

Dynamic Content

Real-time content updates at zero print cost

Dayparting

Schedule ads by time of day for precision targeting

Cost Efficient

Multiple advertisers per screen, reducing cost per campaign

Audience Analytics

Measurable foot traffic & audience analytics via sensor data

Proventus Digital — The only partner you need from strategy to screen.

Our Clientele

Trusted by Leading Brands

From global telcos to national broadcasters, financial institutions, and retail chains — brands across Kenya trust Proventus to make them seen.
